_editGuide: To approve a deliverable: change status from 'pending' to 'approved', fill in approverName and date. Status options: pending, approved, blocked.

strengths.asset: Object Type Cookbook v2 + Addendum A
strengths.assessment: Production-grade. 9 object type varieties, decision trees, quality metrics, peer review checklists.
Doctrinally sound. Definition-first, PR-based governance, full-time stewardship mandate.
Strong training curriculum. Covers Kimball, Inmon, Data Vault with Foundry mapping.
5-layer architecture with Foundry mapping. L3 correctly identified as critical layer.
Comprehensive. Covers foundations through military application.
Ready for CTO signature. 7 testable hypotheses.
CDS taxonomy, NCDSMO baseline, Foundry cross-enclave sync patterns.
Landing page, OPORD 0015-26 context, team roster, timeline.
React graph editor with xyflow. IR extraction pipeline works.
Static site serving 4 training decks with slide preview and downloads.
Clean interactive reference establishing DA as first-class child of EA.

gaps.risk: Without the signed Compass, every standard in the Cookbook is advisory, not authoritative.
Every team builds from scratch. No shared starting point.
No traceable thread from DoD Data Strategy to Foundry object type.
Cannot answer: is the architecture being used?
The 7 hypotheses remain untested. Leadership cannot act on assertions.
Each team figures out CDS independently. Inconsistent patterns.
No visible critical path. Leadership cannot track progress.

phases.name: Establish Authority
phases.objective: Convert the existing body of work into signed, enforceable institutional authority. Without this, everything downstream is optional.

deliverables.title: Enterprise Data Compass v1.0
deliverables.description: Compile the Cookbook, Semantic Layer Instructions, and 5-Layer Stack into a single signed reference. CTO and CDAO signature blocks. Version-controlled.

deliverables.title: Tool Convergence Directive
deliverables.description: Get the existing convergence memo signed by the CTO. Issue moratorium on new non-strategic tool adoption.

deliverables.title: Foundry/Vantage Platform Designation
deliverables.description: Formal command guidance designating Foundry/Vantage as the authoritative operational data platform.

deliverables.title: HERMES Program Charter
deliverables.description: Formalize HERMES with scope, authority, resourcing, and reporting chain.

exitCriteria: Enterprise Data Compass signed by CTO/CDAO
Tool convergence memo signed and moratorium in effect
Platform designation guidance issued
HERMES charter approved

phases.name: Build the Foundation
phases.objective: Deploy the first production ontology objects and complete the first doctrine-to-ontology mapping. Prove the methodology works end-to-end.

deliverables.title: Core Ontology Starter Set
deliverables.description: Deploy foundational object types: Unit, Person, Equipment (entities) + WarfightingFunction, OperationalDomain, Echelon, ClassificationLevel (CVs) + Capability + SIGACT (event). Each passes Cookbook peer review.

deliverables.title: First Doctrine-to-Ontology Mapping
deliverables.description: Complete Addendum A worksheet for one priority domain (Readiness or Force Structure). Document REUSE/EXTEND/CREATE decisions with full traceability.

deliverables.title: CDS Architecture Pattern Validation
deliverables.description: Implement and validate Foundry cross-enclave sync for at least one object type across NIPR/SIPR.

deliverables.title: DDOF Pilot Product (Phase 1-3)
deliverables.description: Run DDOF playbook end-to-end on one data product. Validate VAULTIS-A quality gates. Document lessons learned.

exitCriteria: Core starter ontology deployed in production Foundry
At least one doctrine mapping completed with peer review
CDS sync validated for at least one object type
One DDOF product through Gate 3 with VAULTIS-A scores documented

phases.name: Scale Through Training
phases.objective: Ensure every person building on the ontology has completed training and can pass a competency check.

deliverables.title: Training Certification Program
deliverables.description: Build assessments for each level (Foundations, Level 2, Semantic Layer). Minimum passing score. Certificates tracked in HERMES.

deliverables.title: Level 3 Training: Advanced Patterns
deliverables.description: New deck covering CDS ontology patterns, bitemporal modeling, entity resolution, and DDOF integration.

deliverables.title: Leadership Briefing Package
deliverables.description: Condensed training for G3/G8/CTO audiences. Why it matters, how to consume it, how to govern it.

deliverables.title: Train-the-Trainer Cadre
deliverables.description: Certify 3-5 instructors who can deliver training at echelon without ODT presence.

exitCriteria: Assessment mechanism deployed for all training levels
Level 3 deck complete and peer-reviewed
At least one leadership briefing delivered to GO/SES audience
3+ certified trainers outside ODT core team

phases.name: Govern and Measure
phases.objective: Prove the architecture is being adopted, deliver audit data, and stand up self-sustaining governance.

deliverables.title: 90-Day Tool and License Audit
deliverables.description: Quantify: total license costs by tool, FTEs on platform admin vs. operational output, cross-domain availability, capability overlap with Foundry.

deliverables.title: Ontology Health Dashboard
deliverables.description: Foundry Workshop dashboard: object type count, link coverage, quality scores, consumer count, freshness, VAULTIS-A scores.

deliverables.title: Architecture Review Board (ARB)
deliverables.description: Stand up ARB per EA_04 Governance. Connect to Cookbook peer review and DDOF Phase 1 gate. Charter, criteria, cadence.

deliverables.title: Talent Reclamation Report
deliverables.description: Using audit data, quantify personnel recovered from redundant platform management. Map to Foundry roles.

exitCriteria: Audit report delivered to CTO with quantified findings
Ontology health dashboard live in production Foundry
ARB chartered and operational with first review completed
Talent reclamation report with specific transition recommendations

phases.name: Expand and Sustain
phases.objective: Scale beyond USAREUR-AF core to multi-echelon, joint, and coalition adoption.

deliverables.title: Multi-Echelon Deployment
deliverables.description: Push ontology access and training to division and brigade level. Measure time-to-first-product at each echelon.

deliverables.title: Joint Adoption (NAVEUR / USAFE)
deliverables.description: Execute onboarding plan for NAVEUR and USAFE. Validate semantic layer supports joint operational concepts without forking.

deliverables.title: NATO Interoperability Validation
deliverables.description: Test ontology objects against NAFv4 viewpoints using Architecture Builder. Validate STANAG alignment. Document gaps.

deliverables.title: Program Roadmap (Live Artifact)
deliverables.description: Deploy AG Grid roadmap with actual program data. Capability gaps mapped to funded initiatives. Monthly update cadence.

deliverables.title: Enterprise Data Compass v2.0
deliverables.description: Incorporate lessons learned from Phases 1-4. Update standards based on production experience. Add joint/coalition patterns. Re-sign.

exitCriteria: At least 2 echelons below theater producing data products on shared ontology
At least 1 joint component onboarded to shared semantic layer
NAF alignment assessment completed with documented results
Live roadmap accessible to command leadership

dependencies.from: CTO/CDAO signature on Enterprise Data Compass
dependencies.mitigation: Pre-brief CTO. Use convergence memo as forcing function.

dependencies.blocks: Phase 3 training (need real objects to train against)
dependencies.mitigation: Begin design in parallel with Phase 1 signatures.

dependencies.blocks: Phase 4 ARB decisions and Phase 5 resource reallocation
dependencies.mitigation: Start audit data collection in Phase 1.
Identify candidates in Phase 2. Begin certification in Phase 3.
Start CDS work in Phase 2 and do not stop. Hardest technical risk.

bottomLine.priority1: Get the Enterprise Data Compass signed. Without this, the Cookbook is a suggestion. With it, the Cookbook is law.
bottomLine.priority2: Get the convergence memo signed. The moratorium creates urgency.
bottomLine.priority3: Deploy the core ontology starter set. Every day without shared objects is a day teams build in isolation.
bottomLine.summary: The doctrine is written. The tools are built. The training exists. Now make it real.
